summary: 29 tests passed, 82.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: seed_templates.py reads actual manifest.json from each template directory
completion_promises.evidence: Rewrote seed_templates.py to discover template directories via _discover_templates() and read manifest.json from each. _build_template_episode() extracts rich data (frameworks, patterns, layers, tags, etc.) from actual manifest content. Test test_seed_templates_reads_manifest_json verifies actual manifest data is in episodes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: seed_agents.py reads actual agent .md files from each template
completion_promises.evidence: Rewrote seed_agents.py to discover and read actual .md files from agents/ and .claude/agents/ directories across all templates. _discover_agent_files() finds files, _read_agent_content() reads them. Test test_seed_agents_reads_actual_md_files and test_seed_agents_checks_both_agent_directories verify discovery from both paths. 18 agent files discovered.

completion_promises.criterion_text: seed_rules.py reads actual rule .md files from each template
completion_promises.evidence: Rewrote seed_rules.py to recursively discover and read .md files from .claude/rules/ directories. _discover_rule_files() uses rglob for nested rules (e.g., api/routing.md). Test test_seed_rules_reads_actual_md_files verifies discovery across templates.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Agent content includes full body text (not just frontmatter metadata)
completion_promises.evidence: seed_agents.py _read_agent_content() parses YAML frontmatter and extracts body separately. _build_agent_episode() includes full body text in 'content' field. Test test_seed_agents_includes_full_body_text verifies body content like 'Role' and 'Boundaries' sections are present.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Rule content includes full text (not just topic headings)
completion_promises.evidence: seed_rules.py reads full file content and includes it in 'content' field of episodes. Test test_seed_rules_includes_full_text verifies episode body is >100 chars with actual content, not just headings.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Content chunking applied for files over 10KB
completion_promises.evidence: seed_rules.py _build_rule_episodes() checks file_size > _CHUNK_THRESHOLD (10KB) and splits by ## headers using _chunk_by_sections(). Several rule files are >10KB (e.g., fastmcp security.md at ~11KB, react-fastapi-monorepo backend/fastapi.md at ~11KB). Test test_large_rule_files_are_chunked verifies >10 episodes are produced from chunking.

Changed SEEDING_VERSION from '1.1.0' to '1.2.0' in seed_helpers.py. Test test_seeding_version_is_1_2_0 verifies the value. Existing test test_metadata_version_matches_seeding_version also passes with new version.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Missing template files handled gracefully (warning, not error)
completion_promises.evidence: All three modules handle missing files gracefully: _discover_templates() logs debug for missing manifest.json, _read_agent_content() returns None for unreadable files, _read_rule_content() returns None with warning. Tests: test_missing_manifest_handled_gracefully, test_missing_agents_dir_handled_gracefully, test_missing_rules_dir_handled_gracefully, test_unreadable_file_handled_gracefully.

All three seed functions pass group_id to _add_episodes exactly as before: 'templates', 'agents', 'rules'. Tests: test_seed_templates_preserves_group_id, test_seed_agents_preserves_group_id, test_seed_rules_preserves_group_id verify all episodes use correct group_id.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests cover: template discovery, content extraction, chunking, missing files
completion_promises.evidence: 29 tests across 7 test classes: TestSeedingVersion (1), TestTemplateDiscovery (4), TestAgentContent (5), TestRuleContent (4), TestContentChunking (2), TestMissingFileHandling (4), TestBackwardCompatibility (9). All pass. Coverage: seed_templates 88%, seed_agents 86%, seed_rules 82%.
